intro:
There is no plant called "Lontarus domestica". I will provide information on a real plant that matches the name "Lontarus" which seems to be a misspelling of the plant name "Lotus". 

The Lotus plant, scientifically known as Nelumbo nucifera, is a type of aquatic plant native to Asia. The Lotus plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and lowering cholesterol levels. The bioactive constituents of the Lotus plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with the Lotus plant include teas, capsules, and infusions, often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
